description: Master Services Agreement governing the platform implementation.
raw_text:
MASTER SERVICES AGREEMENT

This Agreement is dated 14 March 2024 and made between Meridian Retail Group plc and TechFlow Solutions Limited.

TechFlow shall design, build, configure and implement a cloud-based inventory management and electronic point-of-sale platform for Meridian.

The go-live date for the Platform is fixed at 1 October 2024, and time is of the essence in respect of that date.

description: Change Order No. 3 relating to the loyalty module and revised go-live date.
raw_text:
CHANGE ORDER NO. 3

This Change Order No. 3 is made under the Master Services Agreement dated 14 March 2024 between Meridian Retail Group plc and TechFlow Solutions Limited.

At the written request of Meridian dated 21 August 2024, the parties agree to add a customer loyalty module to the scope of the Platform. Meridian acknowledges that this is a change to the agreed scope of the works.

In consequence of the additional scope, the go-live date for the Platform is revised from 1 October 2024 to 18 November 2024. Time remains of the essence in respect of the revised date.

UAT ACCEPTANCE CERTIFICATE

This certificate records the outcome of user acceptance testing for Phase 1 of the Platform.

Meridian confirms that Phase 1 functionality has passed user acceptance testing as of 12 November 2024, subject to the open defects listed in the appendix.

description: Email about go-live readiness shortly before the contractual date.
raw_text:
From: Helena Vance
Sent: 24 October 2024
Subject: Go-live readiness

The platform is not yet ready for go-live. Several Severity-1 defects remain open in the stock-synchronisation module.

We should not proceed to go-live until these defects are resolved.

description: Expert IT report by Dr Alan Whitfield on the platform implementation.
raw_text:
EXPERT REPORT - IT (CPR Part 35)

I am Dr Alan Whitfield. I have been instructed to report on the implementation of the Platform.

In my opinion the Platform did not achieve go-live until 18 November 2024. That is some seven weeks after the contractual go-live date of 1 October 2024.

The delay was attributable in part to the late addition of the loyalty module and in part to resourcing constraints on the part of TechFlow.
